# hetzner_ssh_key (Data Source)

Use this data source to read an SSH key stored in the Hetzner Robot account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_ssh_key" "example" {
  fingerprint = "ab:cd:ef:01:23:45:67:89:ab:cd:ef:01:23:45:67:89"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fingerprint` (String) Fingerprint of the SSH key to look up.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation date of the SSH key.
- `data` (String) Public key in OpenSSH format.
- `name` (String) Name of the SSH key.
- `size` (Number) Key size in bits.
- `type` (String) Algorithm type: RSA, ECDSA, or ED25519.
